title: חק defining
body:
# חקק חק to layout, to outline

## translations
- layout/to layout
- outline/to outline
- boundaries OR bounds / to set an enumerate or demarcate bounds or boundaries
- measure OR portion / measure (out) OR portion out
- limit Or limitation / to set a limit or limitation (up to this point) [describing the terminus of you freedom of movement)
- a trace-ing (out) / to trace (out) 
- an allotment / to allot
- a ration/ rations

## passages

Ezekiel 4:1
LEB “Now, son of man, take for yourself a brick, and you must put it before you, and you must portray **(inscribe an outline or layout)** on it a city, Jerusalem.
HB2 4:1 וְאַתָּה בֶן־אָדָם קַח־לְךָ לְבֵנָה וְנָתַתָּה אוֹתָהּ לְפָנֶיךָ וְחַקּוֹתָ עָלֶיהָ עִיר אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלִָם:

Job 14:5
LEB If his days are determined, the number of his months is with you; you have appointed his boundaries **(you have fixed in place demarcated boundaries)**, and he cannot cross them.
HB2 14:5 אִם חֲרוּצִים יָמָיו Eמִסְפַּר־חֳדָשָׁיו אִתָּךְ חקו חֻקָּיו עָשִׂיתָ וְלֹא יַעֲבוֹר:

Job 26:10

LEB He has described a circle on the face of the water between light and darkness.
Job 26:10 YLT A limit He hath placed on the waters, Unto the boundary of light with darkness.
HB2 26:10 חֹק־חָג עַל־פְּנֵי־מָיִם עַד־תַּכְלִית אוֹר עִם־חֹשֶׁךְ:

Genesis 47:22

LEB Only the land of the priests he did not buy, for there was an **allotment** for the priests from Pharaoh, and they lived ATE on the allotment/ **rations** that Pharaoh gave to them. Therefore they did not sell their land.

HB2 47:22 רַק אַדְמַת הַכֹּהֲנִים לֹא קָנָה כִּי חֹק לַכֹּהֲנִים מֵאֵת פַּרְעֹה וְאָכְלוּ אֶת־חֻקָּם אֲשֶׁר נָתַן לָהֶם פַּרְעֹה עַל־כֵּן לֹא מָכְרוּ אֶת־אַדְמָתָם:



## notes
- very geographical in nature
- Lay of the Land
- Note from the NET

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: It may be to pun intended delimiting to limit this lexical route to boundary or limit or outline which puts the semantic emphasis on outskirts whereas because of the idea of a track a ration movement or a layout or inscription which it is literally to scratch or inscribe this might be better imagined like if you were to go on the ghost ride in Disney world and you were on a track to follow and you do not deviate from the inscribed or prescribed track or pre laid out tracks stick to the track

- replace every instance of 2Ch with "2Chron"
